case_id: AAPL and MSFT daily OHLCV (2023-01-03 to 2024-12-31)

pi_items.source: File inspection: benchmarks/cua_world/environments/ninja_trader_env/data/AAPL.Last.txt confirmed to contain AAPL stock data
File inspection: benchmarks/cua_world/environments/ninja_trader_env/data/MSFT.Last.txt confirmed to contain MSFT stock data
Evidence documentation: benchmarks/cua_world/environments/ninja_trader_env/evidence_docs/README.md states 'Yahoo Finance data imports correctly in NinjaTrader semicolon format'

Web search verification against StatMuse: AAPL 2023-01-03 close $123.33 vs file $125.07 (1.41% difference); AAPL 2024-12-31 close $249.06 vs file $250.42 (0.55% difference); MSFT 2024-12-31 close $418.41 vs file $421.50 (0.74% difference). OHLC integrity check: all records satisfy H >= max(O,C) and L <= min(O,C). Data logically consistent with real market data.
File format inspection: 502 trading day records per stock spanning from 2023-01-03 to 2024-12-31, consistent with NYSE trading calendar (~252 trading days per year × 2 years)

File inspection: Each line contains yyyyMMdd;open;high;low;close;volume format (e.g., '20230103;130.28;130.90;124.17;125.07;112117500'). Confirmed in import_data.ps1: 'NinjaTrader (end of bar timestamps), semicolon-delimited yyyyMMdd;open;high;low;close;volume'
File inspection: First line of AAPL.Last.txt and MSFT.Last.txt is '20230103;...'
File inspection: Last line of AAPL.Last.txt and MSFT.Last.txt is '20241231;...'
File line count: AAPL.Last.txt and MSFT.Last.txt both contain 502 lines. Confirmed in evidence_docs/README.md: '502 data record(s) successfully imported'
Task description and metadata both specify EMA (Exponential Moving Average)
Task description step 5: 'Set the EMA Period to 20' and metadata field 'indicator_period': 20

Verifier logic in verifier.py: 'EMA Input series index should be 1 (Secondary) or higher, definitely not 0 (Primary/Default)'. Index 1 represents the secondary series (MSFT), which is correct per task requirements.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real Yahoo Finance historical daily OHLCV data for AAPL and MSFT stocks spanning from January 3, 2023 to December 31, 2024 (502 trading days each). Data is provided in NinjaTrader's standard semicolon-delimited format. The primary instrument is AAPL, secondary is MSFT. Task requires adding an EMA indicator with period 20 applied to the secondary series (index 1). Data authenticity verified through web search comparison (price differences <1.5%) and OHLC logical integrity checks.
